name: Q&A Workflow

shells.sidebar-main: Left sidebar with question categories and main content area

description: Structured Q&A workflow for due diligence with threaded questions, role assignments, and response tracking. Manages bidder and investor inquiries through assignment and resolution cycles.

page_briefs.questions: All Q&A dashboard with a sortable and filterable data table listing every question with columns for title, asker, assignee, category, status (open/answered/clarification), priority, and age. Selecting a row opens a thread preview pane showing the full question, prior replies, and attached documents without leaving the list view.
page_briefs.question-detail: Dedicated question thread page with a detail header containing question title, submitter, assigned responder, status pill, due date, and category tags. Below, the full Q&A thread renders the original question, all replies, internal clarifications, attached documents, and an anchored reply composer for the assigned responder.
